text:
キッチリ、１００％
ニセモノを片付けてくれたみたいね。
上出来、上出来。

……取材任務はさておき
討伐任務はしっかりこなしてくる。
さすがは、守護輝士。

ニセモノばっかに気を取られてたけど
よく考えたら、会場荒らしてるヤツら
一掃しないとイベントできなくない？

……そうだね。
せっかくチョコ作っても
渡せないと困るもんね。

べ、別に、せっかく遊びに来てるのに
中途半端で帰ることになったら
気分良くないってだ

Looks like you 100% took out those fakes.
Good work, good work.

Your surveying may have left something to be
desired, but your suppression certainly
didn't. Nicely done, Guardian.

We got so caught up in that fake business,
I forgot that we'd have to get rid of the
guys messing up the venue to hold the
event at all!

Good point. And what would be the point
of making chocolates if we couldn't give
them out?

I-I mean... I just figured that if they brought
us all the way out here, it'd be a waste not to
do what they called us for in the first place.
